## 📝 Pull Request Description

Summarize the purpose of this pull request, the problem it solves, and the key changes introduced.

Include any relevant context needed by reviewers, such as affected areas, scope, and follow-up work.

| File/Area | Description |

---

## 📊 Type of Change

* [ ] 📖 `docs` — Documentation update
* [ ] ✨ `feat` — New feature
* [ ] 🐛 `fix` — Bug fix
* [ ] ♻️ `refactor` — Code refactoring

---

## 🌿 Branch Checklist

* [ ] Branch follows naming convention (for example, `<type>/<short-description>`)
* [ ] Branch created from the correct base branch (`<base-branch>`)
* [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format

---

## ✅ Pre-Merge Checklist

* [ ] Documentation reviewed for clarity and accuracy
* [ ] Tests and validation completed as needed
* [ ] File structure verified and aligned with repository standards
* [ ] Ready for merge into `<base-branch>`

---

## 🚀 Impact

* Describe the expected impact of this change
* Note any onboarding, maintainability, or workflow improvements
* Highlight any risks, limitations, or rollout considerations
* Add any follow-up items if applicable

---

## 📌 Notes

Add any reviewer notes, assumptions, dependencies, or additional context here.
